title: sample1,cancertissue,male
extract_protocol_ch1: Trizol extraction of total RNA was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Labeled cRNA was generated from the cDNA sample by an in vitro transcription reaction that was supplemented with biotin-11-CTP and biotin-16-UTP (Enzo, Farmingdale, NY, via Affymetrix Enzo BioArray High-Yield Transcript Labeling kits) for 6 hours at 37jC in a PCR machine with no shaking. All of the labeled cRNA were purified using Affymetrix GeneChip Sample Cleanup module.
hyb_protocol: Following fragmentation, 10 ug of cRNA werewere prehybridized to U133A arrays at 45C for 60 minutes and then hybridized for 16 to 18 hours in a rotisserie oven at 60g.
scan_protocol: The arrays were scanned using the GeneArray scanner (Affymetrix).
description: Gene expression data from the hepatocellular carcinoma  tissue
data_processing: Data analysis was done using Affymetrix GeneChip 5.0 software.
